ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Indian Railway Catering & Tourism Corporation Ltd. (IRCTC) has appointed Shri Rajneesh Narain as its Chief Financial Officer and Key Managerial Personnel, effective July 14, 2026, formalizing his role after a brief stint as Director (Finance). Shri Narain brings over three decades of financial leadership, predominantly from the coal industry and related railway infrastructure, which, while robust, represents a notable industry shift from IRCTC's core tourism and catering business. This appointment is a standard governance update, with his extensive experience potentially offering new perspectives despite the industry difference.
